introSection:
Toboggan was a steel roller coaster located at Sportland Pier in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA. It was a Chance Rides Toboggan unit.

The Toboggan has been seen in photographs with the Meteor and its replacement, the Supersonic Roller Coaster, thus it was present at least as early as 1970. It has also been seen in a photograph with the Jumbo Jet, located on the nearby Morey's Pier, thus it was present as late as 1976.
fullText:
Toboggan was a steel roller coaster located at Sportland Pier in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA. It was a Chance Rides Toboggan unit.

The Toboggan has been seen in photographs with the Meteor and its replacement, the Supersonic Roller Coaster, thus it was present at least as early as 1970. It has also been seen in a photograph with the Jumbo Jet, located on the nearby Morey's Pier, thus it was present as late as 1976.
